name: linkedincli
description: Access LinkedIn via a reverse-engineered CLI: view profiles, read feed, search people and jobs, and check notifications.
instructions: Read-only LinkedIn access. Before using any tool, ensure the plugin is configured with a valid li_at cookie. The init script will authenticate automatically. All tools return compact JSON with only the useful fields extracted.

li_at.description: LinkedIn li_at session cookie. Extract from browser DevTools: Application > Cookies > linkedin.com > li_at.
